agent_raw: No methodological issue. The study executes a prospectively planned single-site external validation with pre-specified scope restriction, pre-specified intercept recalibration using only unlabeled prevalence data, pre-specified performance targets, and a held-out evaluation cohort. Within the stated claim — that the model was successfully validated for deployment at a closely matched partner hospital — the evidence is adequate. Limited transportability to other hospital types is a real limitation that is acknowledged and disclosed rather than ignored. Subgroup precision limits are also disclosed. The evaluation is sound.
